dim.name: nChem
dim.description: Number of chemical tracers (nscalar minus nmoist)

dim.name: nkanthro
dim.description: Number of vertical levels in anthropogenic emission file

dim.name: nkwildfire
dim.description: Number of vertical levels in biomass burning emission file

dim.name: nkbiogenic
dim.description: Number of vertical levels in biogenic emission file

dim.name: nkvolcanic
dim.description: Number of vertical levels in volcanic emission file

dim.name: nkreswoodcomb
dim.description: Number of vertical levels in residential wood combustion emission file

package.name: mpas_anthro_in
package.description: parameterization of anthropogenic emissions for mpas-smoke

package.name: speciated_pollen_rupture
package.description: parameterization of speciated rupture for pollen

package.name: mpas_volc_in
package.description: parameterization of volcanic emissions for mpas-smoke

nml_option.name: config_smoke_scheme
nml_option.description: configuration for mpas smoke model

nml_option.name: config_dust_scheme
nml_option.description: configuration for mpas dust model

nml_option.name: config_anthro_scheme
nml_option.description: configuration for mpas anthropogenic emissions model

nml_option.name: config_pollen_scheme
nml_option.description: configuration for mpas pollen model

nml_option.name: config_ssalt_scheme
nml_option.description: configuration for mpas sea salt model

nml_option.name: config_anthro_scheme
nml_option.description: configuration for mpas anthropogenic emissions model

nml_option.name: config_volc_scheme
nml_option.description: configuration for mpas volcanic emissions model

nml_option.name: config_sna_scheme
nml_option.description: configuration for mpas sulfate nitrate ammonium model

nml_option.name: config_methane_scheme
nml_option.description: configuration for mpas methane model

nml_option.name: num_chem
nml_option.description: Number of chemical tracers

nml_option.name: kanthro
nml_option.description: Number of vertical levels in anthropogenic emission input

nml_option.name: kwildfire
nml_option.description: Number of vertical levels in biomass burning emission input

nml_option.name: kbiogenic
nml_option.description: Number of vertical levels in biogenic emission input

nml_option.name: kvolcanic
nml_option.description: Number of vertical levels in volcanic emission input

nml_option.name: kreswoodcomb
nml_option.description: Number of vertical levels in volcanic emission input

nml_option.name: hwp_method
nml_option.description: Algorithm choice for the hourly wildfire potential

nml_option.name: hwp_alpha
nml_option.description: Scale factor for the hourly wildfire potential

nml_option.name: bb_input_prevh
nml_option.description: Number of previous hours to average smoke input variables

nml_option.name: bb_beta
nml_option.description: Emission factor dataset choice

nml_option.name: wetdep_ls_opt
nml_option.description: Flag to turn on offline wet deposition

nml_option.name: wetdep_ls_alpha
nml_option.description: Removal fraction for offline wet deposition

nml_option.name: plumerise_opt
nml_option.description: Algorithm choice for plumerise

nml_option.name: plume_wind_eff
nml_option.description: Algorithm choice for wind effects in plumerise

nml_option.name: plume_alpha
nml_option.description: Entrainment constant for plumerise scheme

nml_option.name: bb_qv_scale_factor
nml_option.description: Scaling factor for water vapor wildfire emissions

nml_option.name: ebb_dcycle
nml_option.description: Algorithm choice wildfire emission forecast

nml_option.name: add_fire_heat_flux
nml_option.description: Logical flag to turn on/off fire heat flux to the atmosphere

nml_option.name: add_fire_moist_flux
nml_option.description: Logical flag to turn on/off fire heat moisture to the atmosphere

nml_option.name: calc_bb_emis_online
nml_option.description: Flag to calculate emissions online

nml_option.name: bb_emis_scale_factor
nml_option.description: Scale factor applied to biomass burning fire emissions

nml_option.name: online_rwc_emis
nml_option.description: Option for online residential wood burning emissions

nml_option.name: rwc_emis_scale_factor
nml_option.description: Scale factor applied to residnetial wood fire emissions

nml_option.name: drydep_opt
nml_option.description: Algorithm choice for dry deposition

nml_option.name: pm_settling
nml_option.description: Algorithm choice for particulate matter settling

nml_option.name: dust_alpha
nml_option.description: Scaling (linear) factor for dust emissions

nml_option.name: dust_gamma
nml_option.description: Scaling (exponential) factor for sediment supply

nml_option.name: dust_moist_correction
nml_option.description: Moisture correction factor for FENGSHA dust

nml_option.name: dust_drylimit_factor
nml_option.description: soil moisture dry limit factor for FENGSHA dust

nml_option.name: plumerisefire_frq
nml_option.description: frequency of call to fire plumerise

nml_option.name: aero_dir_rad_fdb
nml_option.description: Flag that controls the direct aerosol effect

nml_option.name: config_mynn_enh_mix
nml_option.description: Flag that controls artificially enhancing the PBL exhange coefs

nml_option.name: num_pols_per_polp
nml_option.description: number of sub-pollen particles per rupture of primary particle

nml_option.name: pollen_emis_scale_factor
nml_option.description: scale factor for pollen emissions

var.name: unspc_ultrafine
var.description: ultrafine anthropogenic primary aerosol mixing ration

var.name: unspc_fine
var.description: fine anthropogenic primary aerosol mixing ration

var.name: e_bb_in_smoke_fine
var.description: input biomass burning fine smoke emissions

var.name: e_bb_in_smoke_coarse
var.description: input biomass burning coarse smoke emissions

var.name: e_bio_in_polp_tree
var.description: input biogenic coarse tree pollen emissions

var.name: e_bio_in_polp_grass
var.description: input biogenic coarse grass pollen emissions

var.name: e_bio_in_polp_weed
var.description: input biogenic coarse weed pollen emissions

var.name: e_bb_out_smoke_fine
var.description: output biomass burning fine smoke emissions

var.name: e_bb_out_smoke_coarse
var.description: output biomass burning coarse smoke emissions

var.name: e_bio_out_polp_tree
var.description: output emissions of coarse tree pollen

var.name: e_bio_out_polp_grass
var.description: output emissions of coarse grass pollen

var.name: frac_grid_burned
var.description: fraction of grid cell area burned

var.name: qfx_bb
var.description: water vapor flux from biomass burning

var.name: min_bb_plume
var.description: minimumum biomass burning plumerise injection level

var.name: max_bb_plume
var.description: maximumum biomass burning plumerise injection level

var.name: fire_hist
var.description: coefficient to scale the fire activity depending on the fire duration

var.name: coef_bb_dc
var.description: coefficient of diurnal cycle of biomass burning emissions

var.name: hwp_prev24
var.description: Hourly Wildfire Potential over the last 24 hours

var.name: frp_prev24
var.description: Fire Radiative Power over the last 24 hours

var.name: fre_prev24
var.description: Fire Radiative Energy over the last 24 hours

var.name: fmc_prev24
var.description: Fuel Moisture Content over the last 24 hours

var.name: totprcp_prev24
var.description: Total precipitation over the last 24 hours

var.name: fire_end_hr
var.description: Hours since fire was last detected

var.name: PM2_5
var.description: particulate matter less than or equal to 2.5 micrometers in diameter

var.name: PM10
var.description: particulate matter less than or equal to 10 micrometers in diameter

var.name: aod3d
var.description: aerosol optical depth from all aerosols

var.name: aod550
var.description: aerosol optical depth (2D) from all aerosols

var.name: RWC_annual_sum
var.description: Annual sum of residential wood burning emissions

var.name: RWC_annual_sum_smoke_fine
var.description: Annual sum of residential wood burning fine smoke emissions

var.name: RWC_annual_sum_smoke_coarse
var.description: Annual sum of residential wood burning coarse smoke emissions

var.name: RWC_annual_sum_unspc_fine
var.description: Annual sum of residential wood burning fine unspc emissions

var.name: RWC_annual_sum_unspc_coarse
var.description: Annual sum of residential wood burning coarse unspc emissions

var.name: lbc_smoke_fine
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of fine smoke mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_smoke_coarse
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of coarse smoke mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_dust_fine
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of fine dust mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_dust_coarse
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of coarse dust mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_polp_tree
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of coarse tree pollen mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_polp_grass
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of coarse grass pollen mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_polp_weed
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of coarse weed pollen mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_polp_all
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of total primary pollen mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_pols_all
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of total fine pollen mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_pols_tree
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of fine tree pollen mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_pols_grass
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of fine grass pollen mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_pols_weed
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of fine weed pollen mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_ssalt_fine
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of fine sea salt mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_ssalt_coarse
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of coarse sea salt mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_unspc_fine
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of fine primary aerosol mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_unspc_coarse
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of coarse primary aerosol mixing ratio

var.name: lbc_ch4
var.description: Lateral boundary tendency of ch4 mixing ratio

var.name: tend_chem_settle
var.description: tendency of chemistry due to gravitational settling
